description_long: This is a stylized double-bladed axe featuring a broad, curved metal blade on one side and a pointed, dark blade on the other. The axe head is attached to a wooden handle that is slightly curved, providing ergonomic grip and leverage. The handle is wrapped with a reddish-brown grip material at the lower end, likely for improved handling and comfort. The axe head includes a central metallic collar that secures the blade to the handle, and the dark blade side is adorned with a decorative pattern. The overall design suggests a blend of functionality and ornamental style, suitable for display or practical use. The materials and construction indicate durability and a focus on both aesthetics and utility.
description: A stylized double-bladed axe with a curved wooden handle, metallic head, and decorative dark blade. The handle is wrapped for grip and the blade features ornamental patterns.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from a three-quarter angle, highlighting the broad silver blade, the dark decorative blade, and the curved wooden handle with a wrapped grip.
description_view_1: A direct side view showing the narrow profile of the axe, emphasizing the thickness of the handle and the central mounting collar.
description_view_2: The opposite three-quarter angle reveals more of the dark blade's pattern and the curvature of the handle.
description_view_3: A rear view focusing on the back of the axe head and the alignment of the handle, with the grip wrap visible at the bottom.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with an oval cross-section, wrapped in reddish-brown leather at the lower end for grip.
attribute_blade_design: Double-bladed design with one broad, curved silver edge and one pointed, dark blade featuring decorative patterns; includes a central metallic collar.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with a central metallic collar securing the blade to the handle.
